backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Member registry with roles (player, fan, supporter), storing members in a Map keyed by email, and exposing register and getAllMembers (sorted by signup time) endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (AdminPage component, Admin nav link in Layout, /admin route registration in App.tsx) to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining shadcn-compatible OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes without any Blue Panthers branding.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Blue Panthers' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root TanStack Router setup defining three routes (/, /signup, /admin) under a shared Layout, including the AdminPage component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component with a sticky navy navigation bar containing Home, Join the Team, and Admin links for both desktop and mobile menus, plus a footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status to the component tree via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend interaction: useGetAllMembers fetches all members, and useRegisterMember handles member registration with cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Bebas Neue and Inter fonts, defining Blue Panthers navy/gold OKLCH design tokens for light/dark modes, and utility classes for diagonal clips and color helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page that fetches all registered members via `useGetAllMembers` and displays them in a styled table with name, email, role badge, and signup timestamp, plus a stats bar showing counts by role.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the Blue Panthers basketball team featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, team stats, feature highlights, and mascot imagery using the navy/gold theme.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpPage.tsx: Sign-up form page allowing visitors to register with name, email, and role (Player/Fan/Supporter), calling the `useRegisterMember` mutation and displaying success or error feedback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the Blue Panthers design system with navy/gold color palettes, Bebas Neue/Inter fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking implemented features (homepage, sign-up, admin page, routing, theming) and pending feature requests for the Blue Panthers basketball team website.
